return(function(n,z,J,u,L,r,q,B,d,Q,U,l,v,I,P,A,w,e,E,t,c,N,p,f)t,l,p,d,I,E,w,A,c,f,N,v,B,U,e,P,Q=function(n,a)local z=B(a)local J=function(J,u,L,r,q,A)return w(n,{J,u,L;r;q,A},a,z)end return J
